title: Latvia and Estonia to cooperate on strategic reserves
summary_full: As part of the State Visit of the President of Latvia, Edgars Rinkēvičs, to Estonia, the Latvia–Estonia Business Forum “Stronger Together” took place on 2nd July, at the National Library of Estonia in Tallinn, reports Labs of Latvia.
